...
- Engineered prompt engineering and context orchestration frameworks for long-context multi-modal prompts across Bedrock Claude Sonnet and GPT-4 models, incorporating prompt versioning, hallucination mitigation, and dynamic context injection.

# CBRE Artificial Intelligence in CRE Fellowship Program
...
About the ProgramCBRE is the global leader in commercial real estate services and investment and a premier provider of critical infrastructure services.
...
The Artificial Intelligence in CRE Fellowship gives students a front-row view of how AI is reshaping commercial real estate, from investment management and leasing to facilities and property management, through direct access to CBRE leaders applying these tools today.
...
Program Features• Compete in a virtual hackathon, for up to $5,000 in prizes, judged by CBRE mentors• Complete a Building AI Agents course taught by an industry practitioner and finish with a portfolio-ready AI deliverable• Expand your network and deepen your understanding of the industry through direct engagement with CBRE experts

Senior Data Scientist at [CBRE](https://www.linkedin.com/company/cbre)

From my experiences, I've learned that not every problem needs Machine Learning or an AI to be solved. Sometimes, it only takes a holistic approach to draw insights. I believe being a Data Scientist is about solving problems, rather than just building models and pipelines. My technical skill primarily revolves around Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, Data Wrangling and Visualization. I've worked on problems that include Recommendation Systems, Predictive ML, Text Processors and Cluster Analysis. I wish to broaden my skill set as well as apply my past experiences to work on innovative problems. Apart from the time I spend in front of the screen, you'd find me holding a book or fiercely defending my stance in a debate room. On occasion, along with a technical blog, I pen poems about things that matter to me. You'd wonder how this would help me get myself a job, and you'd be right to think so. It probably does not. But that's what I bring to any team I work with - A sense of unconventional solutions, with a tinge of discussion and efficient execution.

Activity: Kyle Bechler, PhD liked this
...
I gave Manus AI a creative director persona I built in ChatGPT and used it to rethink a marketing flyer for one of our Baltimore properties.
...
The difference was dramatic. What started as a fairly standard real estate flyer evolved into something much more cinematic, strategic, and tenant-focused — less “space available” collateral and more of a premium brand campaign for the location itself.
...
The biggest unlock was not just asking AI to make something look better. It was giving it a clearer creative point of view: how to think like a retail leasing strategist, a luxury editorial designer, and a placemaking-focused creative director at the same time.
...
The result took the piece from normal to extraordinary — sharper storytelling, stronger visual hierarchy, better neighborhood context, and a much more compelling reason for tenants to pay attention. #CommercialRealEstate #RetailLeasing #CREMarketing #ArtificialIntelligence #ChatGPT #ManusAI #MarketingDesign #RetailRealEstate #Placemaking #AIinRealEstate
...

results.title: Vinyl A
highlights:
Senior Data Analyst at [CBRE](https://www.linkedin.com/company/
...
As a data enthusiast with a strong foundation in analytics, I hold a Master’s degree in Business Analytics (4.0 GPA) from the University of Illinois, complemented by a Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering from IIT Madras. My academic journey has been fueled by my passion for leveraging data to solve complex business problems, particularly in logistics, supply chain management, and retail. With coursework in Machine Learning, Big Data, and Health Analytics, I’ve honed my ability to draw actionable insights from vast datasets while staying curious about new technologies and methods. I’ve had the privilege of working across industries like logistics, retail, and e-commerce, where I’ve driven impactful projects. From leading k-means clustering analysis to optimize warehouse inventory and reduce holding costs by 15%, to implementing demand forecasting models that improved stock levels by 30%, my experience is a blend of technical expertise and strategic thinking. My roles have involved developing dashboards in Power BI and Tableau, designing scalable ETL pipelines, and leveraging cloud platforms like AWS to transform data workflows. These experiences have allowed me to deliver measurable outcomes, such as a 20% improvement in order accuracy and enhanced decision-making through advanced analytics. Looking ahead, my goal is to continue driving data-driven decisions in a role that bridges analytics, business strategy, and technology. I aim to leverage my skills in SQL, Python, Power BI, and cloud platforms to solve complex challenges, optimize processes, and uncover new opportunities for growth. Whether it’s within supply chain analytics, logistics, or another fast-paced industry, I’m eager to make a lasting impact through innovation and collaboration.

I’m a data and analytics executive with 13+ years of experience leading global teams and delivering scalable solutions that transform enterprise operations and decision-making. In my current role, I lead a global team of analysts serving over 400 clients. I manage analytics platforms as products, generating more than $12M in annual recurring revenue. My leadership spans machine learning innovation, integrated performance scoring systems, and full-spectrum analytics delivery across functions such as Lease Administration, Transaction Management, Finance, and Capital Projects. I specialize in building future-ready data ecosystems that enable predictive insights, operational excellence, and strategic alignment. My approach blends business acumen, product thinking, and a commitment to continuous learning. Currently, I’m deepening my technical expertise in machine learning, generative AI, and modern data engineering tools to prepare for VP-level leadership in high-impact, innovation-focused environments. Areas of Focus: • Enterprise Analytics Strategy & AI Adoption • Productized Data Platforms & Client Solutions • Machine Learning & Risk Scoring Systems • Cross-Functional Team Leadership • ETL Integrations (APIs, SFTP), JIRA/Agile Ops • PropTech, Real Estate Intelligence • Learning LLMs, ML Pipelines, Python, Snowflake Let’s connect if you’re building transformative data capabilities, exploring AI in analytics, or growing innovation-led teams.

As we wrap up the year, I am grateful for the opportunity to reflect on the evolution of our Analytics Consulting service at CBRE, with a heavy lift from Nicholas Francisco and Maryann Morris, M.S. What began in Q2 as a new approach focused on business outcomes first, rather than starting with data and finding problems to solve, has seen remarkable adoption with over 20 clients served and 20 more ready to go to start the new year. Throughout the year, our team has worked closely with clients to turn insights into meaningful actions, resulting in significant improvements in areas such as staffing optimization, asset performance, and portfolio optimization leveraging Gen AI, data science, and traditional analytics.

# Data Scientist (GenAI and Machine Learning)
...
- Get In Touch
- Job Category: Data AI & ML Jobs
- Job Type: Remote
...
Job Category: Data AI & ML Jobs
...
### Responsibilities
...
- Develop and apply machine learning models, including techniques such as decision trees and forecasting, to solve business problems
- Use generative artificial intelligence methods to extract insights from complex document sets, including structured and unstructured text
- Perform data analysis, feature engineering, and model development using Python
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to interpret data, communicate findings, and support decision-making
- Translate domain-specific language and requirements into actionable data science solutions
- Continuously refine models and analytical approaches to improve accuracy and performance
...
### Required experience and skills
...
- Strong background in data science, with hands-on experience in machine learning model development
- Proficiency in Python, including libraries such as Pandas for data manipulation and analysis
- Working knowledge of SQL for querying and managing data
- Experience with generative artificial intelligence, including prompt-based techniques
- Solid understanding of statistical methods and analytical techniques
- Experience with machine learning approaches such as tree-based models and forecasting methods
- Ability to communicate complex analytical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
...
